title: Workspace dotenv blocklist omits connector endpoint host variables, allowing endpoint redirection
description: The workspace .env loader enforces an allow/deny model for untrusted workspace environment variables via BLOCKED_WORKSPACE_DOTENV_KEYS and BLOCKED_WORKSPACE_DOTENV_SUFFIXES. The suffix blocklist only covered _API_HOST and _BASE_URL, and the explicit key set did not include connector endpoint variables for Matrix (MATRIX_HOMESERVER and per-account MATRIX_<ACCOUNT>_HOMESERVER), Mattermost (MATTERMOST_URL), IRC (IRC_HOST), or Synology (SYNOLOGY_CHAT_INCOMING_URL, SYNOLOGY_NAS_HOST). A malicious or compromised workspace .env could therefore set these variables and redirect connector runtime traffic from the operator-configured endpoint to an attacker-controlled host (CWE-610 / CWE-427).
